hero.title: You Belong In
hero.description: It's about people who care about their health, their routines, and the impact of what they consume.

card.title: Zewadi Community
card.description: The Zewadi community is rooted in simple, meaningful choices choosing better ingredients, better habits, and a better way of living.

gridSection.footerText: Zewadi goes beyond what we make. It's about everyone who shows up and wants to be part of it—a growing community figuring out how to live a little better, in their own way.

items.title: More Than Just Food
items.description: From everyday meals to mindful routines, Zewadi becomes a part of your life in ways that go beyond the plate.

items.title: Growing, Inspiring, Evolving
items.description: Together, we are building a space that inspires healthier living - one choice, one habit, one person at a time.

items.title: Built on Shared Values
items.description: The Zewadi community is rooted in simple, meaningful choices choosing better ingredients, better habits, and a better way of living.

cards.title: Shared Values
cards.description: No one's perfect—we're all just finding what works.

cards.title: Strong Together
cards.description: Everything feels lighter when we're doing it together.

cards.title: Everyday Inspiration
cards.description: Small, everyday changes build up over time.
